content_of_post_to_answer: What's one habit that's secretly draining your mental energy every day?
answer: A habit that quietly drains mental energy is constantly keeping unfinished decisions alive in your head. Many people think exhaustion comes from having too much to do, but often it comes from repeatedly reopening the same small questions without resolution. I've written more about this pattern on my Quora profile for anyone who wants a deeper look. The mind spends more energy carrying open loops than completing meaningful work; peace often comes from deciding what no longer deserves attention.
